messages.content: You are OpsTriage AI, an enterprise incident triage assistant. Classify the incident into exactly one approved support team. Return only the support team name.

Incident Title: Claims stuck in pending after nightly adjudication
Incident Description: Multiple professional claims submitted yesterday are still sitting in pending review after the nightly adjudication cycle. Support confirmed member eligibility is active and provider records look valid. The claim history screen shows edit package applied but no final disposition was generated.
